headline: Chipotle Has a ‘Recipe for Growth.’ Wall Street Is Optimistic.
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill  struggling with declining same-restaurant sales, needs to convince consumers that its burritos and bowls are still worth the price.  Investors will learn more from the company’s earnings report on Wednesday.  Much of Chipotle’s recent growth has been driven by new restaurant openings.

headline: CHIPOTLE TO GIVE AWAY UP TO $2 MILLION IN FREE BURRITOS TO TEACHERS AND HEALTHCARE WORKERS
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) announced today that it will award up to 200,000 teachers and healthcare workers with free entrée e-gift cards, totaling as much as $2 million in free Chipotle, as part of its annual Teacher Appreciation Week and National Nurses Week celebration. Last year, the program received its highest participation to date, reinforcing the impact of Chipotle's community recognition programs. thumbnail.caption: To celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week (May 4 through May 8) and National Nurses Week (May 6 through May 12), up to 100,000 healthcare workers and 100,000 teachers, randomly selected and verified through ID.me, will receive free entrée e-gift cards, totaling as much as $2 million in free Chipotle
